name: constipation
title: best herbal teas for constipation
description: Piper nigrum tea contains bioactive constituents such as piperine, limonoids, and flavonoids that have been found to help alleviate constipation by stimulating bowel movements and improving gut health. The tea's laxative properties help to relax the muscles in the digestive tract, making it easier for food to pass through the body.
